mapper.sql: id, name, job_group, invoke_target, cron_expression, misfire_policy, concurrent_flag, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, last_execute_time, next_execute_time
mapper.select: select from sys_job order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_job (name, job_group, invoke_target, cron_expression, misfire_policy, concurrent_flag, status, remark) values (#{name}, #{group}, #{invokeTarget}, #{cronExpression}, #{misfirePolicy}, #{concurrent}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update sys_job set name = #{name}, job_group = #{group}, invoke_target = #{invokeTarget}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, misfire_policy = #{misfirePolicy}, concurrent_flag = #{concurrent}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_job set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_job set last_execute_time = #{lastExecuteTime}, next_execute_time = #{nextExecuteTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_job set next_execute_time = #{nextExecuteTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
